Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}So... there's something I've been meaning to ask...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Are you worried about anything?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}You always seem to be the one listening to my problems, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Are you sure? You don't have to bottle it up. I feel bad that we only ever talk about my issues...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I just thought I could be of some help to you too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 4 25 25}I mean, you're an important friend to me! Doesn't seem fair that it's been a one-way street...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}You don't need to struggle on your own.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It feels like you're always helping others, and not taking care of yourself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}So... I want to be that person for you. I want to look after you the way you do for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Hey, I'm the one who should be thanking you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I'm not! The fact that I'm always relying on you is proof.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}You know, I've always thought there was something special about you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Remember when we first met? You were able to summon your Persona like it was nothing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}And unlike me, you were never afraid to face the Shadows head-on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It's like you're a superhero, saving the day for others in need...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I guess deep down, I thought maybe you didn't need any help from someone like me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}But... just because someone is strong doesn't mean they have to do everything alone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}There's no shame in getting support from other people. And sometimes, that support can help you achieve even greater things.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}That's why I want to be there to help you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I know that might sound weird coming from me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel Yukari's affection.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems we've grown closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Geez, it's embarrassing to say that out loud! I'm gonna go cool my head for a bit![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Point is, you can lean on me as a friend from now on, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari ran off...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
